hero.subtitle: Smart Business Partnership: Create with Passion, Earn with Fairness
hero.headline2: Smart business management with an open heart
hero.headline3: Full independence within a supportive community
hero.headline5: Turn every hour into ownership — together, by consensus

intro.q1: You have amazing talent – but struggle to monetize it alone?
intro.q2: Do you want to stop chasing a paycheck and start building a yielding asset, together?

features.welcome: Welcome to 1💗1 – a new partnership platform. Here, every woman is a queen. Every man is a king. Here we create together – without giving up independence.
features.createRikma: Creating a 'Rikma' – a dynamic, value-based partnership
features.joinRikma: Joining existing Rikmas that perfectly match your schedule, skills, and passion
features.livelihood: Livelihood with purpose: Every hour worked and resource shared becomes equity. True profit sharing, not just a salary.
features.sharedManagement: Shared management: voting, decisions, budgets – with full agreement of the entire partnership group
features.transparency: Full Technological Transparency: The system records every action and decision in real-time. Building trust through transparency, not bureaucracy.
features.tools: Tasks, boards, graphs, and additional tools for simple and efficient collaborative management
features.ownership: Not just a salary – but ownership. Every investment of time or resources transforms into equity and future profits.
features.formula:
Our formula: (Time + Resources) = % in Profits. 
 At 1💗1, no one decides for you. Every task and payment passes through transparent group agreement.
features.mission: At 1💗1 we turn the "survival war" into a "tapestry of prosperity". We use technology to ensure everyone gets exactly what they deserve, so you can create with peace of mind.

cta.agree: Want to bring meaning and joy to your life? Want to open the door to a new reality? Connect to agreement – and register now. Your agreement will appear on the
cta.agreeEnd: and open the way for you to create a new reality. Together we will create a better world

sections.featuresTitle: Everything you need to run a partnership — in one place
sections.featuresSub: Real tools already built into the system, not promises.
sections.ctaFinalSub: Join the platform where every contribution becomes ownership — by full agreement.
sections.proofSub: Every Rikma created here is living proof that we can work differently — by agreement, in transparency and fairness.
sections.mapTitle: An agreement spreading across the world
sections.mapSub: Hundreds of thousands of people worldwide chose to agree on a life of freedom, without coercion and without violence. Your agreement joins the live map.
sections.whoSub: For anyone who wants to create together — and earn fairly.
sections.whoFreelancer_d: Turn work hours into ownership equity, and join partnerships that match your skills and schedule.
sections.whoBusiness_d: Get leads from real demand, manage transparently, and connect your business to a network of complementary partners.
sections.whoCreators_d: Build a shared venture around a dream or goal, with decisions by agreement and transparent profit sharing.
sections.modelSub: Free to start. You earn when the Rikma earns — no hidden subscription fees, just full transparency.
sections.painLead: The truth no one talks about:
sections.pain1: You wake up to work that's a 'must' — not a 'want'.
sections.pain2: You invest hours, talent and energy — and the value you build stays someone else's.
sections.pain3: At month's end the paycheck runs out, and you start from zero again. No asset accrues.
sections.pain4: And there are only two options: an employee with no freedom, or a lone entrepreneur carrying all the risk.
sections.painCost: So whole years are sold cheap — and the dream is postponed to another 'someday'.
sections.painTurn: What if work could be both a calling — and an asset that stays yours?
sections.oldWayTitle: Why the old way doesn't really work
sections.oldWaySub: Between two bad options — there's a third way.
sections.colEmployee_d: False security•No ownership•Someone else decides for you•The paycheck ends every month
sections.colSolo_d: All the risk on you•Loneliness•Heavy management load•No safety net
sections.colRikma_d: Real ownership in %•Full freedom•Decisions by consensus•Partners who complete you•Lifetime profit

platform.projectMgmt_t: Your whole project at a glance
platform.projectMgmt_d: Kanban boards, Gantt, processes, tasks and shifts — the entire Rikma organized in one place, transparent to all.
platform.negotiation_d: A built-in AI negotiation tool that analyzes positions, suggests compromises and guides you to a fair agreement — without expensive mediation.
platform.onboarding_d: Upload a CV or a link to your site/business, and the AI automatically maps your skills, roles and best-fit Rikmas.
platform.telegram_d: Start timers, get notifications and take actions straight from the Telegram bot — no need to open your computer.
platform.aiBot_d: A built-in bot that navigates, opens tasks and sums up the situation for you. You can even connect external AI agents to operate the Rikma via MCP.
platform.transparency_d: Every action and decision is logged in real time, and resolutions pass through voting and consensus with a defined 'decision time'.

concierge.title: Want something? Don't search for it — ask for it.
concierge.subtitle: Tell us in your own words what you need, and around your wish a group will form to make it happen — a new product, from scratch.
concierge.flow: You tell us → Lev breaks it down → a group of providers forms → you approve & receive
concierge.customerDesc: No categories, no chasing vendors. Describe what you want and get a complete plan to approve. Nothing goes out until you publish.
concierge.providerDesc: Customers are already searching — let them find you. Every wish that includes what you offer reaches you as a warm, pre-matched lead, with partners who complete you into a whole package.
concierge.providerCta: Get leads — join as a provider

rikma.title: What is a 'Rikma'?
rikma.desc: A rikma is a group created in 1💗1 around a shared goal – a business, project, dream or any other idea. Members negotiate, reach agreements and distribute resources and profits – all by mutual consent.

s1.title: Fill in your details
s1.desc: Name, location in the world and email address – that's all

s2.title: Choose an agreement

s3.title: Click the spinning globe button
s3.desc: The send button – located at the bottom of the page

s4.title: Welcome to 1💗1!
s4.desc: Registration opens, fill in more details and join the community

compare.title: What's the difference between the agreements?

basic.title: Basic Agreement
basic.desc: Commit to using the platform only with mutual consent and to respecting every user's freedom of choice.
basic.cta: Check the checkbox in the form

full.title: Full Agreement
full.desc: A declaration of a broad global vision – all of humanity agreeing to live in freedom, without violence and without coercion.
full.cta: Go to the full agreement site

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: 1💗1 is a platform for managing agreements and collaborations. It enables people to create groups ('rikmas') around shared goals, negotiate and reach agreements in a transparent and organized way.
faq.q2: What's the difference between 1💗1 and the agreement site?
faq.a2: 1💗1 (1lev1.com) is the collaboration platform – the place where you create rikmas, manage projects and work together. agreement.1lev1.com is an independent site dedicated to the global vision of the worldwide agreement.
faq.q3: Is it mandatory to visit the full agreement site?
faq.a3: No! You can agree to the basic agreement (checkbox in the form) and continue straight to registration. The full agreement site is an optional extension for those who want to join the global vision.
faq.q4: What happens when I return from the full agreement site?
faq.a4: You automatically return to the registration page with confirmation that you have signed. The details you filled in the form are saved and you can continue directly to registration.
faq.a5: A rikma is a group in 1💗1 created around a shared goal. The metaphor is a biological colony: cells that cooperate and together create something greater, while each preserves its own cellular autonomy. Each member is a cell, and together they are the rikma.
faq.a6: After registration you can join existing rikmas, create a new rikma, manage projects and work with people from around the world – all by mutual consent.

features2.passiveIncome: Real passive income – lifetime profits, based on investment, based on agreement
features2.ledger: Distributed digital ledger – full transparency, no bureaucracy
features2.sharingItems: Sharing items and abundance between Rikmas and people – recycling, connecting, and earning
features2.freedomCharter: Want to walk with us? It's simple. You need to agree to the Global Freedom Charter – a document of values, not laws.
features2.agreementMapText: Your agreement will appear on the Agreement Map and open the way for you to create a new reality
features2.rikmaDefinition: A Rikma is a group of people with different skills and resources, creating together a product or providing a service and sharing profits based on relative investment and agreement

fpage.whyDifferentDesc: 1💗1 isn't just a business platform - we're part of a global movement of people choosing to work in mutual agreement, not coercion. Every partnership here is living proof that working differently is possible.
